evidence.note: NYC Preliminary Citywide Racial Equity Plan released April 6, 2026 — first governmentwide racial equity framework in NYC history
Mayor Mamdani announcement of REP; data-driven agency goals across 7 domains
NYC published True Cost of Living Measure — standard-setting
Seven-domain framework including Housing, Community Safety/Rights/Accountability, Economy, Health
NYC highest-ranked US city in index makes this benchmark-setting signal

conditions.checkpoint_requirement: Implementation evidence for NYC Preliminary Citywide Racial Equity Plan across all 7 domains. If implementation is stalled or materially delayed, upgrade is reconsidered and may be partially or fully reversed.

note: Upgrade is conditional on REP implementation evidence. Pending implementation, confidence is medium rather than high. Revisit Q3 2026 for implementation checkpoint.
